goal: Make the Celtic 'challenge' position read 'The Obstacle' / 'อุปสรรค' consistently across the app
done: EN positionChallenge 'The Challenge'->'The Obstacle' in js/common.js; poster FULL_POSITION_LABELS en 'The Challenge'->'The Obstacle' and th 'ความท้าทาย'->'อุปสรรค' in share/poster.js.
symptom: Inconsistent crossing-position label: reading result said 'อุปสรรค' (TH) but the poster said 'ความท้าทาย' (TH); EN said 'The Challenge' everywhere.
root_cause: The poster carries its own FULL_POSITION_LABELS table separate from common.js, and the earlier TH 'อุปสรรค' change only touched common.js.
fix: Align both tables to obstacle: EN 'The Obstacle', TH 'อุปสรรค', on reading result and poster.
verified: grep sweep of js/share/html: no remaining 'The Challenge' or 'ความท้าทาย' position-label (only card-meaning prose, left alone)
affects: Celtic Cross position-2 label on the reading result and the share poster, EN + TH
notes: Founder chose obstacle over the more-common 'The Challenge' for EN/TH consistency with the existing TH 'อุปสรรค'. Mirror sync deferred (BUG-015).
